lines.gurmukhi: ਪੜਿ ਪੜਿ ਦਝਹਿ ਸਾਤਿ ਨ ਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: parr parr dajheh saat na aaee |
lines.english: Reading and studying, they burn, and do not find tranquility.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਲਾਹਹੁ ਆਤਮ ਰਾਮੁ ਸਖਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: mil satasangat naam salaahahu aatam raam sakhaaee he |7|
lines.english: Joining the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation, praise the Naam, the Name of the Lord. The Lord, the Supreme Soul, shall be your helper and companion. ||7||
Abandon slander and envy of others.
Abandon your involvement in egotistical affairs and conflicts.
Abandon sexual desire, anger and wickedness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਗੈ ਬਿਮਲ ਨਦੀ ਅਗਨਿ ਬਿਖੁ ਝੇਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: aagai bimal nadee agan bikh jhelaa |
lines.english: In the hereafter, you shall have to cross over the fiery river of poisonous flames.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਰਣਿ ਪਰਹੁ ਤਾ ਉਬਰਹੁ ਇਉ ਤਰੀਐ ਭਵਜਲੁ ਭਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: satigur saran parahu taa ubarahu iau tareeai bhavajal bhaaee he |8|
lines.english: If you seek the Sanctuary of the True Guru, then you shall be saved. In this way you shall cross over the terrifying world-ocean, O Siblings of Destiny. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੜ ਭੜ ਅਗਨਿ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਦੇ ਲਹਰੀ ਪੜਿ ਦਝਹਿ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਤਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: bharr bharr agan saagar de laharee parr dajheh manamukh taaee he |9|
lines.english: The ocean of fire spits out waves of searing flames; the self-willed manmukhs fall into it, and are roasted there. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਥੈ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ਜੀਉ ਇਕੇਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: tithai avar na koee jeeo ikelaa |
lines.english: No one else will be there; your soul shall be all alone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਹਿ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਦਾਨੁ ਦੇ ਭਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur peh mukat daan de bhaanai |
lines.english: Liberation comes from the Guru; He grants this blessing by the Pleasure of His Will.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਪਾਇਆ ਤਿਨ ਪੂਛਹੁ ਭਾਈ ਸੁਖੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵ ਕਮਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: jin paaeaa tin poochhahu bhaaee sukh satigur sev kamaaee he |10|
lines.english: So ask one who has obtained it, O Siblings of Destiny. Serve the True Guru, and find peace. ||10||
He alone knows the way, who obtains it.
The Messenger of Death smashes his head and humiliates him.
Without the Guru, he dies entangled in sin and corruption.
So speak the Truth, and realize the Lord deep within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਧੇ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਨਰ ਨਿੰਦਕ ਡੂਬਹਿ ਨਿੰਦ ਪਰਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: baadhe mukat naahee nar nindak ddoobeh nind paraaee he |11|
lines.english: The slanderous person is not freed of his bonds; he is drowned, slandering others. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਘਨੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਤਰੁ ਤਾਰੀ ਇਉ ਭਵਜਲੁ ਪਾਰਿ ਲੰਘਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: bighan naahee guramukh tar taaree iau bhavajal paar langhaaee he |12|
lines.english: No obstacles shall block your way; become Gurmukh, and cross over to the other side. This is the way to cross over the terrifying world-ocean. ||12||
He is not far away; look, and see Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਜੀਉ ਮਰੈ ਨ ਮਾਰਿਆ ਜਾਈ ਕਰਿ ਦੇਖੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਰਜਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: naa jeeo marai na maariaa jaaee kar dekhai sabad rajaaee he |13|
lines.english: The soul does not die, and it cannot be killed; God creates and watches over all. Through the Word of the Shabad, His Will is manifest. ||13||
The Naam, the Name of the Lord, abides deep within the body.
The Creator Lord is eternal and imperishable.
He is immaculate, and has no darkness.
The True Lord Himself sits upon His throne.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਕਤ ਕੂੜੇ ਬੰਧਿ ਭਵਾਈਅਹਿ ਮਰਿ ਜਨਮਹਿ ਆਈ ਜਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: saakat koorre bandh bhavaaeeeh mar janameh aaee jaaee he |14|
lines.english: The faithless cynics are bound and gagged, and forced to wander in reincarnation. They die, and are reborn, and continue coming and going. ||14||
The Guru's servants are the Beloveds of the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਤੁ ਲਹਹਿ ਅੰਤਰਗਤਿ ਜਾਣਹਿ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਸਾਚੁ ਵਡਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: tat laheh antaragat jaaneh satasangat saach vaddaaee he |15|
lines.english: They realize the essence of reality, and know the state of their inner being. This is the true glorious greatness of those who join the Sat Sangat. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਇ ਬੈਸਹਿ ਤਖਤਿ ਸੁ ਸਬਦੁ ਵੀਚਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: oe baiseh takhat su sabad veechaare |
lines.english: Contemplating the Shabad, they sit upon His throne.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਤਿਸ ਕਾ ਲਾਲਾ ਗੋਲਾ ਜਿਨਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੬॥੬॥
lines.translit: naanak tis kaa laalaa golaa jin guramukh har liv laaee he |16|6|
lines.english: Nanak is the servant and slave of that Gurmukh who lovingly focuses his consciousness on the Lord. ||16||6||
His companions are liberated; He carries them across.
He Himself saves His humble servant, and saves his ancestors as well.
For many ages, only darkness prevailed;
Maaroo, First Mehl:
the infinite, endless Lord was absorbed in the primal void.
Thirty-six ages passed like this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੁੰਧੂਕਾਰਿ ਨਿਰਾਲਮੁ ਬੈਠਾ ਨਾ ਤਦਿ ਧੰਧੁ ਪਸਾਰਾ ਹੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: dhundhookaar niraalam baitthaa naa tad dhandh pasaaraa he |1|
lines.english: He sat alone and unaffected in absolute darkness; the world of conflict did not exist. ||1||
God is hidden throughout the four ages - understand this well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸਹਿ ਸਰੀਕੁ ਨ ਦੀਸੈ ਕੋਈ ਆਪੇ ਅਪਰ ਅਪਾਰਾ ਹੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tiseh sareek na deesai koee aape apar apaaraa he |2|
lines.english: No rival of His can be seen. He Himself is infinite and endless. ||2||
He causes all to happen by the Pleasure of His Will.
He pervades each and every heart, and is contained within the belly.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੁਗੁ ਜੁਗੁ ਏਕਾ ਏਕੀ ਵਰਤੈ ਕੋਈ ਬੂਝੈ ਗੁਰ ਵੀਚਾਰਾ ਹੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jug jug ekaa ekee varatai koee boojhai gur veechaaraa he |3|
lines.english: The One and Only Lord prevails throughout the ages. How rare are those who contemplate the Guru, and understand this. ||3||
From the union of the sperm and the egg, the body was formed.
From the union of air, water and fire, the living being is made.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਚੋਜ ਕਰੇ ਰੰਗ ਮਹਲੀ ਹੋਰ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹ ਪਸਾਰਾ ਹੇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: aape choj kare rang mahalee hor maaeaa moh pasaaraa he |4|
lines.english: He Himself plays joyfully in the mansion of the body; all the rest is just attachment to Maya's expanse. ||4||
The Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts, knows everything.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਮਾਲੇ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਉਦਰ ਮਝਾਰਾ ਹੇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: saas saas sach naam samaale antar udar majhaaraa he |5|
lines.english: With each and every breath, he contemplated the True Name, deep within himself, within the womb. ||5||
Within the mother's womb, upside-down, the mortal meditated on God.
